SOUTHERN ISRAEL · דְּרוֹם יִשְׂרָאֵל
20,000+
rockets and mortars fired at Israel since 2001 — ranging from Sderot to Beersheba
Residents of Sderot have 15 seconds to reach shelter when a rocket launches — the city sits less than 1 km from the Gaza fence
Over 1 million Israelis — 12% of the population — live within rocket range of Gaza
